description: illood County Reporter A L Fontaine Editor and Pro GRAND RAPIDS WISCONSIN U J SEWS OT THE WORLD WAR Some sharpshooters with machine guns and mountain artillery have al ready landed to aicl Garcia A Cuban pilot who has returned from Santiago says there are 15000 Spanish troops in that city The correspondent of the Paris Temps says there is a report in Madrid that Manila has surrendered Our Cuban allies at Guantanamo har bor hanged a Cuban captured in Camp McCalla and proved a spy The blowing up of a smokeless pow der mill near Cincinnati is believed to have been the work of Spanish agents The sending of reinforcements to General Shatter will be hurried The expedition will probably leave this week The British consul at Santiago has sent word that nothing happened to Hobson or others during the bombard ment ExPresident Cleveland in an ad dress at Lawrenceville N J school declared against a policy of imper ialism Advices from Manila state that the rebels are steadily gaining The Span iards have retreated into the old walled city The government from now on will impress steamers on the Pacific coast on which to carry our army to
